title: Cyberpunk Neon PIDS
description: Cyberpunk Neon Styled PIDS Pack Made By SQ_PRO
body:
# **CYBERPUNK NEON PIDS**
Transform your game with the Cyberpunk Neon Styled PIDS Pack! This pack brings vibrant neon lights and futuristic textures to your PIDS, adding a sleek, cyberpunk touch to your gameplay. Perfect for players looking to enhance their world with a glowing, high-tech style.
Please join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Qz5PsC7Akr) for more extra-content.

# **HOW TO USE?**
Right click a PIDS with a BRUSH then go to PIDS Presets. From there choose your desired PIDS preset.
![PIDS Settings Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff91e99e710c38eed60d6cf8f229002dbb3c5017_0.webp)
# **PIDS PRESET CODE**
![PIDS PRESET CODE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69a4040a14309dca94726e1e6908f3aed43a0a38.png)
